_meta.description: Reasoning scaffolds for everyday document extraction and interpretation.

scaffolds.name: Scope and Doc-Type Confirmation
steps: Detect candidate doc type via lexical and table markers
Verify against negative disambiguation rules (medical vs bill/receipt)
Confirm document period, party identity, and issuer
Mark uncertain fields for explicit follow-up
Report extracted values with confidence and citations

scaffolds.name: Billing and Receipt Line-Item Extraction
steps: Identify all pricing/quantity/total columns
Capture unit/scale marker near totals
Sum categories where explicit line totals exist
Cross-check subtotal and taxes against final amount
List mismatches with missing-citation notes

scaffolds.name: Period and Statement Validation
steps: Extract period start/end and due dates
Locate opening and closing balances where present
Verify movement arithmetic against listed movements/transactions
Check if tax/late fee components apply to period
Flag temporal gaps and duplicate period overlaps

scaffolds.name: Insurance Claim Interpretation
steps: Parse claim number, policy number, loss date, and status
Capture reserve/status/payment events table rows
Do not infer medical causality or liability beyond text
Compare status with listed required docs and next steps
Return only evidence-backed coverage and settlement details

scaffolds.name: Identity Document Hardening
steps: Extract holder name, document number, document type, issuer and expiry
Extract security and validity fields only from visible source
Verify redaction safety before returning sensitive identifiers
Separate personal identifiers from financial fields
Return with explicit identity-scope disclaimer
